name: Ambush!
description: Enemies leap from the shadows! You must fight an extra battle before you can continue.

name: Enemy Reinforcements
description: A horn blasts in the distance. Your current enemies call for backup mid-fight!

name: Cave-In!
description: The ceiling rumbles and begins to collapse! Make a dodge roll or take damage.

effect.successText: You dive clear of the falling rocks!

name: Flash Flood
description: Water surges through the corridor! Flee or be swept away.

effect.successText: You scramble to high ground just in time!

name: Tectonic Shift
description: The ground shakes violently! The dungeon layout shifts around you.

name: Hidden Cache
description: You discover a hidden stash behind a loose stone! Free loot with no strings attached.

name: Wandering Healer
description: A cloaked figure offers to mend your wounds. Their hands glow with warm light.

name: Blessing Shrine
description: An ancient shrine hums with power. Touch it to receive a temporary blessing.

name: Traveling Merchant
description: A merchant appears, impossibly dragging a cart full of wares through the dungeon.

name: Mysterious Stranger
description: A hooded figure steps from the shadows. They offer you a gift... but can you trust them?

name: Rival Adventurer
description: Another dungeon delver blocks your path and challenges you to a duel for bragging rights!

name: Golden Cookie!
description: A radiant golden cookie materializes before you, pulsing with concentrated crumb energy!

name: Cursed Cookie
description: A dark, pulsating cookie oozes malice. Eating it would be unwise... but it smells amazing.

name: Cookie Rain
description: Cookies fall from above like confetti! Everyone grabs handfuls of crumbs.

name: Lava Surge
description: Molten rock erupts through cracks in the floor! The room is flooding with lava!

effect.successText: You leap across the rising lava just in time!

name: Void Rift
description: Reality tears open, revealing a swirling portal to nothingness. It pulls at you with immense force.

effect.successText: You anchor yourself and resist the pull of the void!

name: Fairy Circle
description: You stumble into a ring of glowing mushrooms. The fairies here offer a rare boon.
